presentation.description: UI components with identical API for React, React Native, Solid, Svelte and Vite. No compromise, no duplication.

usability.label: Usability
usability.title: Designed to be simple
usability.description: Production-ready components with minimum friction. Install, import and build.
usability.f1Desc: Same props and behavior across all frameworks.
usability.f3Desc: Consistent spacing, color and typography system.
usability.f4Desc: Buttons, inputs, modals, tables, overlays and more.

frameworks.label: Multi-framework
frameworks.title: One code.
frameworks.description: Same components, same API, same props. Only the import changes.

stepByStep.label: Step by step
stepByStep.title: From zero to production
stepByStep.description: In less than 5 minutes you have your first working UI.
stepByStep.s1Desc: One dependency, no complex peer deps.
stepByStep.s2Desc: One line in your app entry point, just once.
stepByStep.s3Desc: KivoraProvider enables imperative modals and global contexts.
stepByStep.s4Desc: Import any component and use it directly.

docs.issueDesc: If you find a bug or want to suggest an improvement, open an issue on GitHub.
docs.issueBody: If you find a bug or want to suggest an improvement for <highlight>{target}</highlight>, open an issue. We review them regularly.
